name: Wand of Caustic Effluence
description:
This dirty metal wand is covered in an oily acrid smelling film.

Activate

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast , but the grease is caustic. If you cast this spell on an area, any creature that fails their Reflex save and falls , or that begins their turn prone, takes ] damage. If you cast this spell on an unattended object, the first creature to pick up the object during the duration takes ] damage. If you cast this spell on an attended object and the holder or wielder fails their Acrobatics or Reflex save, the holder or wielder takes ] damage. If you cast this spell on a worn object, any creature who s or Grabs the wearer takes ] damage.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of grease
